lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: What brings you down here, [Colosseum rank]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I heard all the grunting and metal clanging. I wanted to see what was going on.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: What do you think of our training area?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... It smells a bit.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: That is the smell of courage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: Greetings, [Colosseum rank].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You lot sure look busy down here.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: We strive to become the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well best of luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: Hello, [Colosseum rank]. You'll have to excuse me. I'm keeping an eye on the other contenders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May the odds be ever in your favour.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: What a nice thing to say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not tired of doing that all day?

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: I'm going to slay anything in my path!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You certainly are determined!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: Stand back, [Colosseum rank]. I need to concentrate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seemed to have that weapon mastered.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: Kill...

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: No...

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: ... survivors!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's impressive. I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: Can't talk... I've got 100 more to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hel-

lines.speaker: Gladiator
lines.text: Can't you see I'm busy here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course... Enjoy your floor pushing.
